name: [Negative] App Issues, Security Concerns, and Poor User Experience
description: Users complained about various issues including app crashes, poor performance, unreliable transactions, delayed fund transfers, incorrect auto-linked bank account information, and lack of transparency in withdrawal and conversion processes. There are also concerns about data security and potential misuse of customer information. Additionally, users expressed disappointment with the app's user interface, lack of advanced features, and poor customer support experience.
